repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

network ad_hoc_net
   protocol WSF_COMM_ROUTER_PROTOCOL_AD_HOC
   transceiver
       WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
       frequency 300 mhz
       power 10 kw
   end_transceiver
end_network

platform_type COMM_NODE_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
       maximum_speed 1 m/sec
       minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform node_a COMM_NODE_TYPE
   side blue
   route
       position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   network ad_hoc_net
end_platform

platform node_b COMM_NODE_TYPE
   side blue
   route
       position 30.70n 104.10e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   network ad_hoc_net
end_platform

platform node_c COMM_NODE_TYPE
   side blue
   route
       position 30.73n 104.13e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   network ad_hoc_net
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/ad_hoc.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
   enable all
   file output/ad_hoc.evt
end_event_output

end_time 240 sec
end_platform
end_platform
end_platform
